history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade step failed because it was executed under JDK 11, but Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ (class file version 61 vs 55).
history.qwen_rationale: Moving the upgrade_spring_boot_3_3 step to run under JDK 17 allows the post-recipe compilation to succeed, as the JDK version now matches the minimum requirement for Spring Boot 3.x artifacts. The SB3 meta-recipe internally handles the Java 17 build configuration, so the chain can proceed directly to Java 17 transforms and then Java 21.
